---
title: "02. и—ҸиұЎе®ҳеҲ¶дёҺиә«дҪ“ж”ҝдҪ“"
subtitle: "Organ Governance and Somatic Polity"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 2
categories: [huangdi-neijing, cultural, omega]
description: "How the Neijing's organ-office system maps bodily governance onto ring-like closure, layered functional hierarchy, and many-to-one diagnostic stabilization classes."
---

**Chapters:** зҙ й—®08-12, зҙ й—®23-25, зҒөжһў04-05, зҒөжһў29, зҒөжһў33, зҒөжһў47, зҒөжһў51  
**Omega Directions:** `ring arithmetic`, `modular tower inverse limit`, `fiber structure`

{{< include articles/category_02_organ_governance_somatic_polity.md >}}

---

[Back to Huangdi Neijing Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
